name: Golf Augusta
about: Golf Augusta is a comprehensive golf superstore located in the Pinehurst area, offering both in-store and online retail options for a wide range of golf equipment. The venue provides custom club fitting services powered by high-definition Trackman Launchpad technology, ensuring precision club and shaft sizing tailored to individual builds and playing styles. In addition to sales and fittings, the facility offers simulator rental for testing new equipment and personalized lessons from certified professionals, making it a one-stop destination for golfers of all abilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman Launchpad technology for precise club fitting
Comprehensive retail store with access to top-tier equipment brands
Ability to rent simulator to test new gear in a realistic environment
Professional coaching available from certified golf instructors

simulator_hardware.notes: High-definition launch monitor for club fitting and simulator rental

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue offers club rentals for use during simulator sessions or lessons. The fitting service is designed to help you find the right clubs for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink services, and there are no keywords indicating a BYOB policy. It is recommended to check directly with the venue for their policy outside items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the duration of an 18-hole simulator session. Contacting the venue directly is advised to get accurate timing details.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Golf Augusta offers services suitable for families, such as club fittings and lessons, but there is no specific information regarding dedicated kid-friendly amenities or junior programs available on the website.
